fields.name: HSIRDY
fields.description: HSI16 clock ready flag. (After wakeup from Stop this bit will be read 1 once the HSI16 is ready)

fields.name: HSIKERON
fields.description: HSI16 always enable for peripheral kernel clocks.

fields.name: MSIRDY
fields.description: MSI clock ready flag (After reset this bit will be read 1 once the MSI is ready)
